business.headline: World Bank raises India growth forecast to 6.6% for 2026-27 from 6.3% earlierWorld Bank raises India growth forecast to 6.6% for 2026-27 from 6.3% earlier

Trump warns of 50% tariffs on countries supplying weapons to IranThe statement comes at a time when global geopolitical risks are already high, especially in West Asia. Any move to impose such tariffs could have wider implications for global trade and diplomatic ties.

The S&P BSE Sensex rallied 2,946.32 points to end at 77,562.90, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 873.35 points to close at 23,997.35.

Resilient, safe, strong: RBI assures banking system safe amid recent jittersRBI Governor highlighted that the broader banking system remains stable despite global challenges. He said there are no systemic risks to the profitability or health of banks, even as global uncertainty remains due to the West Asia conflict.

Why did RBI keep repo rate unchanged at 5.25%? Know these 5 reasonsNo change in the repo rate this time, but the move is far from random. The RBI has carefully weighed multiple factors before deciding to hold at 5.25%. Here are five reasons behind the decision.

Lower oil prices ease pressure on inflation and the overall economy, giving the central bank more room to maintain stability.

The actor revealed that the project was actually pitched to filmmaker Anurag Kashyap in the middle of the celebrations at Sobhita Dhulipala's wedding.

No love notes for Sanya Malhotra and Rishab Rikhiram Sharma anymore? After a year of hush-hush romance, Sanya Malhotra and Rishab Rikhiram Sharma have reportedly broken up. Wondering the reason? Here's everything you need to know about their quiet breakup.

I was cautious, he was fearless: Aditya Dhar credits Mukesh Chhabra for Dhurandhar Aditya Dhar praised Mukesh Chhabra for shaping Dhurandhar: The Revenge with his fearless vision and dedication. He said Chhabra's casting made the film feel more real, adding that the department is often overlooked despite being a crucial part of filmmaking.

Chiraiya writer reacts to backlash, trolling on marital rape theme: Didn't foresee it Chiraiya writer Divy Nidhi Sharma reacted to backlash and trolling over the show's marital rape theme, saying he didn't foresee it. He added that such reactions only highlight why stories like Chiraiya are important.

The third season of the show, featuring Zendaya, also has new additions such as Natasha Lyonne and Sharon Stone.

Ram Charan's Peddi likely to miss April release, makers consider June: Reports Ram Charan's much-awaited film Peddi might face another delay, missing its April 30 release date. Reports suggest that the makers are planning to announce a new release date likely after the IPL concludes in June.

Aneet Padda to play double role in Aditya Sarpotdar's Shakti Shalini: Report Actor Aneet Padda is set to take on a double role in Shakti Shalini, which will mark a shift from her previous on-screen image. Directed by Aditya Sarpotdar, the upcoming film is slated for a December release.

Mrunal Thakur dives into action in a saree for Dacoit, calls it toughest genre yet Mrunal Thakur turned action star with Dacoit, calling it her toughest genre yet as she takes on high-octane stunts for the first time. The actor opened up about stepping out of her comfort zone, performing intense sequences, and discovering a new side to her craft.

Atlee's birthday gift to Allu Arjun is Raaka, an idea he held for 18 years Director Atlee shared a special message on Allu Arjun's birthday, while unveiling the title and first-look poster of their film, Raaka. The grand fantasy actioner is expected to release in 2027.

general news.headline: No uranium enrichment, we'll talk tariff and sanctions relief with Iran: TrumpTrump says US will seek zero uranium enrichment from Iran while negotiating tariff cuts and sanctions relief after ceasefire; claims parts of a broader deal already agreed.

Iran humiliated, was out of options and time: US says Tehran begged for ceasefire  Live UpdatesUS Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said that Iran was "humiliated" and "out of options and time," forcing Tehran to come to the negotiating table. He also said Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire only after its leadership was weakened and military capabilities crippled.

Iran's oil refinery hit; missiles pound UAE, Kuwait, Lebanon despite ceasefireA wave of fresh attacks – from Iran's own oil infrastructure being hit to the UAE, Kuwait and Bahrain coming under Iranian missile and drone fire and Israeli strikes intensifying in Lebanon – cast immediate doubt over whether the two-week ceasefire can hold.

How 'farcical', 'b***s**t' Israeli intel led Trump to Iran warThe origins of the Iran conflict can be traced back to a closed-door briefing in the White House that was attended by Israeli PM Netanyahu, Trump and his aides. After the meeting, several of Trump's aides, including Marco Rubio and JD Vance, were not on the same page regarding a military campaign in Iran.

I stopped using Blinkit and Instamart for 30 days. My wallet (and health) thanked meI deleted Blinkit and Instamart from my phone just to see if I could survive in this digital-first world. It seems, I thrived.

Live: Iran warns of stronger response if US, Israel attack again, vows to back LebanonUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: In a sudden shift from threats to pause, Donald Trump said he would halt US military action against Iran, at least for now, signalling a possible opening for diplomacy. Posting on Truth Social, Trump said, "I agree to suspend the bombing and attack of Iran for a period of two weeks," framing the move as part of a broader push toward a ceasefire. The decision, he said, followed conversations with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Army chief Asim Munir, who urged him to hold off on planned strikes. Iran has accepted Pakistan's two-week ceasefire proposal. The ceasefire has been approved by the country's new supreme leader, signalling a possible opening for de-escalation. Iran said talks with the US should not be interpreted as signalling the end of the war, adding that its 10-point proposal calls for lifting all primary and secondary sanctions, full compensation payments, and the release of all frozen Iranian assets. Tehran said it will only accept the war's conclusion once all details are finalised in line with the 10-point plan, Iranian media reported. Negotiations with the US are to be held in Islamabad on 10th April (Friday) to finalise details. Catch all the live updates at Indiatoday.in.

TVK loses one seat even before its debut contest in Tamil Nadu pollsThe nomination of a TVK candidate from the Edappadi constituency has been rejected, and the candidate has now gone missing, with the party alleging kidnapping.

Amazon responds after reports claim it may lay off 14,000 employees next monthAmazon is reportedly planning for another major round of layoffs. The American giant may fire as many as 14,000 workers across divisions globally with some teams possibly shutting down. The company has cut 16,000 roles in January this year.

However, it has now emerged that China's discreet diplomacy and a last-minute intervention got Iran on board for the two-week ceasefire deal. Thus, China, and not Pakistan, has emerged as the real player.

But when it came to MI, the approach seemed to lack the intent needed to pull off a big chase.
